newChip.comment: Badge shown on a folder node immediately after it is created

folderAriaLabelX.comment: Aria-label for a folder node in the tree. { name } is the folder name

dragToMoveFolderAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the drag handle icon on a folder node
dragToMoveFolderAriaLabel.fr-ca: Faites glisser pour déplacer le dossier
dragToMoveFolderAriaLabel.ja: フォルダをドラッグして移動

deleteFolderAriaLabelX.comment: Aria-label for the delete button on a folder node. { name } is the folder name
deleteFolderAriaLabelX.ja: フォルダ {名前} を削除します
